item.title: New Farm, New Experiences on the Land
item.description: Explore the first days on a new farm, from learning routines to tackling fresh challenges. Join in as new experiences shape daily farm life.

media:content.media:title: New Farm, New Experiences on the Land
media:content.media:description: Explore the first days on a new farm, from learning routines to tackling fresh challenges. Join in as new experiences shape daily farm life.

item.title: Dougo’s Dream Comes True: Hook, Line, Sinker
item.description: Watch Dougo finally achieve his dream with the perfect catch. A satisfying moment of success and joy in this fishing adventure.

media:content.media:title: Dougo’s Dream Comes True: Hook, Line, Sinker
media:content.media:description: Watch Dougo finally achieve his dream with the perfect catch. A satisfying moment of success and joy in this fishing adventure.

item.title: City Vehicle Stuck in Country Snow
item.description: A city vehicle struggles in deep country snow. Watch the effort to free it and see the techniques used to safely get it back on the road.

media:content.media:title: City Vehicle Stuck in Country Snow
media:content.media:description: A city vehicle struggles in deep country snow. Watch the effort to free it and see the techniques used to safely get it back on the road.

item.title: Clearing 5 Feet of Ice from a Floor Drain
item.description: Watch the intense process of removing five feet of ice from a floor drain. Techniques and tools used make the job safer and more efficient.

media:content.media:title: Clearing 5 Feet of Ice from a Floor Drain
media:content.media:description: Watch the intense process of removing five feet of ice from a floor drain. Techniques and tools used make the job safer and more efficient.

item.title: Fire Breaks Out on the Farm
item.description: A fire ignites on the farm, and quick action is taken to contain it. Watch the response and safety measures used to protect property and livestock.

media:content.media:title: Fire Breaks Out on the Farm
media:content.media:description: A fire ignites on the farm, and quick action is taken to contain it. Watch the response and safety measures used to protect property and livestock.

item.title: Grain Tank Auger Accident on the Farm
item.description: Watch as a grain tank auger gets crushed during farm work. See the damage, recovery steps, and lessons learned to prevent future equipment mishaps.

media:content.media:title: Grain Tank Auger Accident on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Watch as a grain tank auger gets crushed during farm work. See the damage, recovery steps, and lessons learned to prevent future equipment mishaps.

item.title: Test Drives That Lead to More
item.description: A simple test drive sparks excitement and new opportunities. Watch how one ride can lead to unexpected discoveries and decisions in the automotive world.

media:content.media:title: Test Drives That Lead to More
media:content.media:description: A simple test drive sparks excitement and new opportunities. Watch how one ride can lead to unexpected discoveries and decisions in the automotive world.

item.title: 18-Year-Old Tractor Gets Major Upgrades
item.description: An 18-year-old tractor receives new upgrades to improve performance and efficiency. Watch the restoration and modernization process in action on the farm.

media:content.media:title: 18-Year-Old Tractor Gets Major Upgrades
media:content.media:description: An 18-year-old tractor receives new upgrades to improve performance and efficiency. Watch the restoration and modernization process in action on the farm.

item.title: Quad Tractor Breaks Down on the Farm
item.description: Watch as a quad tractor experiences a breakdown during farm work. See the troubleshooting and repair process to get it running smoothly again.

media:content.media:title: Quad Tractor Breaks Down on the Farm
media:content.media:description: Watch as a quad tractor experiences a breakdown during farm work. See the troubleshooting and repair process to get it running smoothly again.

item.title: Caterpillar D4 Hyster Winch Overhaul
item.description: Watch the complete overhaul of a Caterpillar D4 Hyster winch. Restoration steps focus on regaining full power and functionality for heavy-duty operations.

media:content.media:title: Caterpillar D4 Hyster Winch Overhaul
media:content.media:description: Watch the complete overhaul of a Caterpillar D4 Hyster winch. Restoration steps focus on regaining full power and functionality for heavy-duty operations.

item.title: Smallest Tractor Needs Work Before Sale
item.description: Watch the smallest tractor in the fleet get a thorough checkup and repairs before being sold. See the maintenance, challenges, and prep work involved.

media:content.media:title: Smallest Tractor Needs Work Before Sale
media:content.media:description: Watch the smallest tractor in the fleet get a thorough checkup and repairs before being sold. See the maintenance, challenges, and prep work involved.

item.title: We’re in a Selling Mood
item.description: Watch as equipment and farm items get ready for sale. See the prep, cleanup, and decisions involved in selling and passing along valuable machinery.

media:content.media:title: We’re in a Selling Mood
media:content.media:description: Watch as equipment and farm items get ready for sale. See the prep, cleanup, and decisions involved in selling and passing along valuable machinery.
